title: When in doubt, remake other YTPMVs' visuals!
description:
Can you guess every vid I referenced in this part? Answers are below.
I will be slowly uploading sections of my newest Funny Rave set, which can be watched in its entirety here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ay-nBOaR1Ys







Spoilers, the YTPMVs are:
1. Osmium Alloy Bomb by Khezu https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kBKr8YLuVgs
2. Powerlines by Star https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CQ_vr2WmXfw
3. Maitreya (Vivit In Ea) by Noble https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HcEGKHcQkJo
4. Spies Like You by DeeWaL and RandomTVBox https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=soGFRS_Rm4I
5. BLITZ by RandomTVBox https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1XOeGWHGrRM
6. No Point in Rebellion by +TEK https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ZfCm4GhWOU
7. LEMOND SKIES by Reinee https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iYeaK4958Js
8. School-yard by Robyn https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ATsL2QVsCd8
